conditions.condition: proposal does not authorize real provider calls
conditions.evidence: The proposal states that Gate O only authorizes contract preflight and that paid calls require later human provider and credential approval.

conditions.condition: credential values cannot be stored in docs, logs, fixtures, or evidence
conditions.evidence: credential_boundary forbids Markdown docs, runtime evidence artifacts, runner logs, committed fixtures, and hard-coded constants.

conditions.condition: hard cost ceilings apply before any paid call
conditions.evidence: cost_controls references cost-ceilings.md with per-project daily USD 5, global daily USD 30, soft alert 80 percent, hard_block=true, and single paid smoke max USD 1.

conditions.condition: raw+parsed provider evidence and drift detection are required
conditions.evidence: provider_evidence_contract requires raw output refs/digests, parsed output, parser schema version, cost facts, drift status, and replayability.

conditions.condition: subscription CLI, deploy, PR, external repo, Web, IDE, and production scope remains forbidden

recommendation: Gate O passes. Implement only Phase 10 no-network provider contract preflight artifacts, then review through Gate P before asking for human approval of a single paid smoke call.
